app_topics: the material, component and element composition of products via the query-optimized fq: dataset, COMPUTED LIVE by the Python oracle
example_questions: How much copper is in elvBEV?
Which elements does elvBEV contain, and in what amounts?
What does V0301030105 contain at the Component level?
List all classes that contain Copper.
How much iron is in elvBEV?
How much of each element is in the elvElectricMotor?

endpoints.label: FutuRaM live (PoC, computed in Python)
endpoints.description: PROOF OF CONCEPT — the SAME query-optimized fq: dataset as the futuram Fuseki endpoint, but the fq: graph is COMPUTED LIVE by the Python oracle on each request rather than precomputed and stored in Jena. Ask 'how much of <constituent> is in <class>' via the fq:contains pattern; declare the constituent KIND via the ontology: '?e rdfs:subClassOf futuram:Element' (or Component/Material). The unattributed remainder of every whole is a first-class futuram:unknown* constituent row, so each level's amounts sum to 1.0. NOTE: rdflib-endpoint serves the SPARQL protocol at the ROOT path, so the endpoint URL has no /query/sparql suffix.
